raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wisch attahpe arridsan
no ta Kehnixa Nebukadnezara/
kas winnu pee Deewa lizzis
swebreht/un tappę pahrgalwigs/
un apzeetinaja fawn Sirdi / ka
tas pee ta KUNGA Israëta
Deewa ne atgreesehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſti Rihki ta Dee
Namma leelt un masi/ un
KUNGA Namma Mantas/
ta Kehnixa un winna Leelu-Ku
gu Mantas/ wiſt tappe us V
beli wests.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tä patt arridsan darrija
wiſtu Preestern Wirneeki / nn
tee Landis tohti dauds Grekus/
pehz wiſahm Pagaru Neganti-
bahm/ un jagabnija ta KUNga
Nammu/ ko winsch Jerusaleme
bij swehtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fadedsinaja to D
wa Nammu / un nolausfia
rusalemes Muhrus / un fadei
naja wiſtus winna skats
Nammus ar Uaquni/ ka w
winnu dahrgi Rihki tappe
maitatı.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS winnu
Tehwn Decws / tas fuhtija pee
teem zaur farveem Webstne-
scheim / un darrija to agri/ un
fuhtija. Jo winsch faudseja fa-
wus Landis un fawu Mahias-
Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas no Sobixa
likke/ to aiswedde winsch us V
beli / un tee tappę winnam
winna Dehleem var Kalpecu
tekams to Perseru Walsti
jahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee apmihtija Dee-
wa Webstneschus / un nizzinaja
winnu Wahrdus/ un apjmebje
winna Praueeschus/ teekams ta
KUNGA Bahrsiba prett fa-
weem Laudintik augsti zehlahs/
ka ne kahda Dseedinaschana
wairs palihdseja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka peepildihts taptu
KUNGA Wahrdz zaur Jeren
jus Mutti/teekams tai Semn
sawa Duffeschana gann bij p
tikkuti/ wiſtu Laiku/ ko ta po
sta gulieja / Duffeja winna/ t
mehr feptindeſmits Gaddi p
pilditi tappę.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlehę pretti teem
to Kaldeeru Kehninsch/ un noka-
we winnu jaanus Wibrus ar
Sobinnu / winnu Swehtibas
Nammā / un ne faudseja neds
Jannekts/ neds Jumprawus/
neds Wezzus/neds tohstihri wez-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet pirmā Gaddā Ko
fa to Perseru Kehnixa / ka
KUNGA Wahrdz zaur Jeren
ju runnahts peepildihts taptu
pamohdinaja tas KUNGS K
reta to Perseru Kehnixa Garr
ka tas wiſtā fawā Walstitā lit
issankt / uu arri israkstht /
tazziht:
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
